# Rust-specific patterns for .goneatignore
# Generated by goneat init for Rust projects

# Generated by Cargo
debug/
target-*/

# Remove Cargo.lock from .goneatignore if scanning a binary application where lockfile policy matters.
Cargo.lock

# rustfmt backup files
**/*.rs.bk

# MSVC Windows builds
*.pdb

# Test coverage
*.profraw

# Documentation
docs/book/

# Benchmark results
benchmarks/

# Development tools
.cargo/
rustfmt.toml
